rooms.name: Merchant Annex
rooms.desc: You are in the Merchant Annex.  In the distance you can see the lower level to the shoppe area.

rooms.name: West Corridor
rooms.desc: You are in the west end of a VERY long corridor.

rooms.name: Corridor
rooms.desc: You are traveling through a long corridor.

rooms.name: Corridor
rooms.desc: You are traveling through a long corridor.

rooms.name: Corridor
rooms.desc: You are traveling through a long corridor.

rooms.name: East Corridor
rooms.desc: You are at the east end of a VERY long corridor.  There is a large opening directly to the south.

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is a dank little hole. Strange sounds abound...

rooms.name: Underground Stream
rooms.desc: The water again grows quiet, the thundering noise is left behind..

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: The wild ride would be exilerating, if you weren't worried about being killed.

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: The rapids veer rapidily to the west..

rooms.name: Underground Stream
rooms.desc: The stream runs North and South here..

rooms.name: Underground Stream
rooms.desc: The water is quieter here. At last..

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: Sheesh! Won't these rapids ever end? How long can you take it?

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: The water sprays white, in all directions as you try to keep your craft from turning over!

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: Swiftly, you swerve your little craft to avoid a bolder..

rooms.name: Underground Stream
rooms.desc: This is a quiet underground stream..

rooms.name: Underground Stream
rooms.desc: You are in a quiet underground stream...

rooms.name: Underground Pool
rooms.desc: This is a quiet underground pool. A stream is to the west..

rooms.name: Underground Pool
rooms.desc: The quietness is creepy. Slimy walls are north and east..

rooms.name: Burial Chamber
rooms.desc: You are in a large burial chamber.  The bodies of many unfortunate adventurers are piled throughout the room.  There is a place in the corner with YOUR name carved in the wall!! A faint message, partially rubbed off, warns "Travel south at your own risk!!"

rooms.name: Burial Entrance
rooms.desc: You have reached the entrance to the burial chamber.

rooms.name: Ladder Room
rooms.desc: There is a ladder leading UP here!

rooms.name: Ladder Room
rooms.desc: There is a ladder leading DOWN here!

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: This is the northeast corner of the cavern, you think...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You follow the face of the cliff to the north..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You have to dodge some stones falling from the roof of the cavern..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You are in some sort of small inlet, but the walls are much too sheer to land the dingy..

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: The rapids goes shooting downhill to the north. It looks more quiet to the east..

rooms.name: Underground River
rooms.desc: You are in an underground river, the current flows from the east..

rooms.name: Underground River
rooms.desc: The river is rather swift here, with some rocks..

rooms.name: Quiet Pool
rooms.desc: The water quietly slaps against your dingy. There is a granite wall rising sheer, to the west.

rooms.name: Underground Pool
rooms.desc: A slippry granite wall is to the east. All else is darkness..

rooms.name: Embalming Room
rooms.desc: The Embalming Room, adjacent to the Caretakers quarters, reeks of the smell of formaldehyde and pieces of unfortunate adventurers.  Take care not to disturb him.

rooms.name: Caretaker'S Lair
rooms.desc: You have entered the lair of the Caretaker.  He does not appreciate being disturbed!

rooms.name: Picasso Exhibit
rooms.desc: You have entered Picasso's Exhibit.

rooms.name: Rembrandt Exhibit
rooms.desc: You have entered Rembrandt's exhibit area.

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The granite walls continue to the west..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You can barely make out a wall to the west, shining in the light of your torch.

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You think you hear something, but it is only your stomach rumbling..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You wonder how far this blasted lake goes!

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The water seems to be moving of it's own accord...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The cavern ends here, but there is an underground river to the east! And a short but steep water fall is north...

rooms.name: Small Pond
rooms.desc: You are in the small pond. The roaring is coming from a water falls to the west....

rooms.name: Underground River
rooms.desc: The river is quite rough, making you pick your way carefully by the light of your torch.. It suddenly feels quite cold..

rooms.name: Underground Pool
rooms.desc: This is the southwest corner of the underground pool. Everything is quiet. Except for that strange woman of course..

rooms.name: Underground Pool
rooms.desc: You imagine you see shadows on the granit walls, but that is silly of course.

rooms.name: Art Gallery Entrance
rooms.desc: You have entered the art gallery.  The guard pays no attention to your presence.

rooms.name: Gallery Hallway
rooms.desc: You have entered the west end of the Gallery Hallway.  There are art annexes in which many rare paintings are exhibited.

rooms.name: Gallery Hallway
rooms.desc: You are in the Gallery Hallway.  There is a large chamber far to the east.

rooms.name: Gallery Hallway
rooms.desc: You are in the Gallery Hallway.  There is a very large room directly to the East.

rooms.name: Spur'S Exhibit
rooms.desc: You have entered SPUR's personal exhibit room.  Here you find many priceless crayon drawings which the Almighty and Omnipotent SPUR has personally donated to the gallery.

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The walls of the huge cavern are to the west, sheer and wet..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: A flapping in the air catches your attention..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You feel the water, and it is icy cold. "Maybe nothing lives in here!" you think hopefully...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: A deathly silence reins, except for you paddling noise. Wait... Whats that gurgling noise?

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: "I wonder how Jock Custoe does stuff like this!" you snicker to yourself, but you shut up, as your snicker echo across the cavern..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The wall of the cavern is to the east, a roaring waterfalls is thundering down there...

rooms.name: Ponds Edge
rooms.desc: This is the edge of a small pond which seems to bubbling up from a underground stream. The roaring noise is very loud here..

rooms.name: Underground River
rooms.desc: The air is bitter cold here, ice hangs from the roof of the underground river.

rooms.name: Underground River
rooms.desc: The cold gets to you, making you wonder if you should turn back, or go just a bit further..

rooms.name: Underground River
rooms.desc: The river goes thru a narrow crevace to the south. Much too narrow for you to enter. But there is a small shelf of land here, where you may land the dingy.

rooms.name: Courtyard
rooms.desc: You are between the art gallery and the museum.

rooms.name: Courtyard Corner
rooms.desc: You have entered the corner of the courtyard.  There is a large fountain nearby.

rooms.name: De Vinci Room
rooms.desc: You have entered Leonardo De Vinci's exhibit hall...

rooms.name: Grant Wood Hall
rooms.desc: You have entered Grant Wood's studio.  There are several partially completed works and fresh paint on a palette lying in the corner.

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The sound of your small waves lapping against the granit walls to the southwest is rather noisy to your ears. You wonder if anything else hears it..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The edge of the lake is to the south, slimy and cold rock..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You imagine you hear a soft slapping, slapping of immense flippers..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You have lost sight of the wall, which you somehow miss...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You follow the cliff to the west..

rooms.name: Rough Tunnel
rooms.desc: The roaring sound of water is louder here..

rooms.name: Rough Tunnel
rooms.desc: You are no longer in the man made tunnels... A faint sound of roaring water can be heard. The tunnel raises steeply to the west..

rooms.name: Underground Ledge
rooms.desc: This is a narrow ledge, covered in bitterly cold ice. It seems to lead to the east. The river is north, of course..

rooms.name: Underground Ledge
rooms.desc: You are at the end of the narrow ledge. The walls rise sheer all around you. Lying about are the remains of some earlier party. You hope you will have better luck getting out. You search thru the debris.

rooms.name: South Courtyard
rooms.desc: You have entered the south end of the courtyard which connects the museum to the art gallery.

rooms.name: Long Passageway
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway, running south and east..

rooms.name: Long Passage Way
rooms.desc: The passageway continues, on a steep decline..

rooms.name: Underground Shore
rooms.desc: There is an underground lake to the east, a passage winds uphill to the west.

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You are in a underground lake, the slapping of water echos erily...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: The lake is very still... rather spooky..

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: You start to wonder if this was such a hot idea..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor raises steeply from south to north here...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor takes a turn here...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor takes yet another turn..

rooms.name: Museum Entrance
rooms.desc: You have reached the Museum.  A sign says NO PETS ALLOWED!

rooms.name: Early Spur
rooms.desc: You have entered the first of several SPUR exhibits.  This room displays the history of the SPUR empire.

rooms.name: Spur Trophy Room
rooms.desc: The SPUR Trophy Room contains many treasures collected by SPUR during the reign over the LAND.

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: You feel your hair standing on end.. What could be to the south to cause such a stiring of excitment?!?!

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The sense of excitment is stronger here..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: A vague sense of excitment is in the air...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: This is the lakes edge. Granite walls rise sheer and forboding to the south and west...

rooms.name: Underground Lake
rooms.desc: An icy current seems to want to drag you to the rocks towards the south, but you fight away..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor seems to branch off here..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor goes is several directions. It raises steeply to the north, and decends to the south..

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Onwards... ever onwards go these corridors..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: You imagine you hear some strange laughter somewhere ahead..

rooms.name: Museum Courtyard
rooms.desc: You have entered the Museum courtyard.  The Museum entrance can be seen off to the north.

rooms.name: Spur'S Vault
rooms.desc: You have entered SPUR's vault.  His most valued treasures and artifacts are displayed behind several inches of unbreakable glass.

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Humph... Nothing here... A dead end... 'Boy, am I silly!' you muse to yourself...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage branches, again....

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The smell is especially strong, here...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Something seems to smell here. Something.... dead...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Nothing much here, except the occasional rat. You wonder what these things live on...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is a narrow corridor decending from north to south..

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor continues, decending from south to north..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: You vaguely wonder what in hell an X-Dragon is doing way down here at the bottom of the tomb. Maybe he was waiting for you or something...

rooms.name: E/W Tunnel
rooms.desc: You have reached the end of a long east/west tunnel.  The tunnel is much too steep to climb.

rooms.name: E/W Tunnel
rooms.desc: You are in a long east/west tunnel.

rooms.name: E/W Tunnel Entrance
rooms.desc: You have reached the entrance to a long tunnel.  The tunnel appears to be quite steep.

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage seems rather oppresive for some reason..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is yet another small burial chamber. The place seems honey combed with them. The mummified corps here, seems to be bored...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The doorway to the west is rather odd looking..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: These blasted corridors seem to go on forever!

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor rounds another corner..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor continues. You hear goulish laughter somewhere.

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor goes in several directions here... There is an odd looking fellow sitting in a corner..

rooms.name: Edge Of Pit
rooms.desc: You have reach the edge of a deep pit.

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is a rear nich of the main burial chamber. There is a tremendous treasure chest here, glittering in your torch light...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway...

rooms.name: Labyrinth
rooms.desc: You are in a maze...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage rounds a corner... What lays beyound?

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: A small candle burns in the darkness to the north..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage raises steeply from south to north..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is a man made corridor, of carved rock. Musty smells abound...

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: The tunnel is quite narrow here, barely enough room to pass..

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: Water is slowly dripping from the ceiling. Going 'plop...plop...'

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: There is a strange mark on the wall to the north. That isn't all....

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: You imagine you hear SOMETHING shuffling in the shadows...

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: The tunnel takes yet another turn..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is part of the main burial chamber. Many ancient artifacts lay about in wild disorder. Probably from grave robbers (such as yourself..).

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are at the end of a long passageway...

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway...

rooms.name: Long Passage
rooms.desc: You are in a long passageway...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Yuk! What is all this slime that is dripping down?!?!

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Something smells vaguly unhealthy...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The air is quite chilly here. You must be quite far underground..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor takes yet another turn. It continues to gently slant downwards..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The walls here are made up of roughly carved stones..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The man made corridor runs north and south..

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: 'My, but this tunnel is crooked,' you think idly as you stumble on...

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: The tunnel is very crooked here, tiny stalagtites get in your way.

rooms.name: Burial Chamber
rooms.desc: The room is rather large...

rooms.name: Burial Chamber
rooms.desc: You begin to wonder if there is any way out of here!

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: A trail of bread crumbs indicate that others have gone before in this blasted maze of tunnels..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Powerful forces crackle in this chamber! It is apparent that you have at last found the main burial chamber. The fellow here, does not seemed pleased..

rooms.name: Secret Chamber
rooms.desc: This is a hidden room in the main burial chamber. A large treasure chest lays in the middle of the room, glowing brightly in your torch light..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: You hear 'crunching' noises to the south..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Brr... You wonder why it is so cold down here. It really should'nt be..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: It is very cold here, ice on the floor makes footing treacherous..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This looks like some sort of ancient guard station. There is even some sort of ancient guard here, somewhat the worse for wear..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This section doesn't smell too good at all..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Yet another intercetion. Now which way to go?!

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor gently decends to the south..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: It looks like there was a small battle here, long ago..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor twists and turns, like it is trying to confuse you..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The narrow passage goes off in all directions! Which way to go now?

rooms.name: Burial Chamber
rooms.desc: A secret door pounds shut behind you! This looks to be a burial chamber for the Pharoh's servants. You suspect they were none too amused...

rooms.name: Burial Chamber
rooms.desc: There is lots of stuff buried here...

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: A soft shuffling noise alerts you that you are not alone...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tome
rooms.desc: A sense of forbodding overcomes you, making you wonder if it is wise to continue..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This section of corridor seems littered with remains of former adventurers..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The crunching noise is rather loud to the west..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This section of the tomb is a regular maze! You stumble onwards, wondering which direction you are going in..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor continues to slant downwards..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage takes a right turn here. You shuffle thru long dead things...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor turns another corner. Faint noises can be heard from the south.

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor continues to gently slop downwards to the west..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: There are the remains of a long dead adventure here...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor is quite narrow here, making it hard to avoid the visitor..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor splits off here. You imagine you hear goulish laughter somewhere.

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The narrow passage turns a corner here. The floor is quite rough..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The narrow passage continues this way..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is a narrow side passage...

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: The tunnel rounds a corner here. A small pair of eyes look at you from a distance..

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: The tunnel branches here..

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: Your torch reveils torches stuck in the sides of the tunnel, long since burnt out...

rooms.name: Narrow Tunnel
rooms.desc: You are in a narrow tunnel, raising from south to northwest..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Yet another corner. It is just a bit cooler here..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor continues on, and on, and on...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This is a strangly familiar room, like you read about it in a book someplace.

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Yet another corner. Noises can be heard ahead..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor dead ends here. It looks to be a small burial chamber, obviously not the MAIN chamber...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor continues east and west...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: There is an oddly shaped opening to the south..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The corridor branches again...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: This a very narrow passage, slanting downwards to the east..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The narrow passage continues..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: Water drips slowely from the ceiling...

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage is very steep here.. The insect looks oddly out of place..

rooms.name: Mummy'S Tomb
rooms.desc: The passage raises quite steeply to the north...

rooms.name: Quiet Pool
rooms.desc: The water seems to end in this quiet pool. There is a narrow bank to the east.. Something moves in the water...

rooms.name: Narrow Bank
rooms.desc: This is a narrow slippery bank. A quiet pond is west, you see a manmade passage to the north..

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: You go thundering down more rapids!

rooms.name: Underground Stream
rooms.desc: There is the sound of more rapids to the west..

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: You begin to worry about the state of your dingy, as it continues to get pounded on the rocks..

rooms.name: Underground Rapids
rooms.desc: Wild, wild water. Are you having fun yet?
